questions.title: 模仿朗读
questions.text: Foshan is a city in Guangdong Province. It is a wonderful place to live and visit. Foshan is famous for its long history and rich culture. It is the birthplace of many traditional Chinese arts and Chinese kung fu. People here also love Guangdong opera. The opera is full of interesting stories. What's more, the food in Foshan is amazing. You can taste delicious morning tea and traditional dishes here. There are many lovely parks in Foshan. People like to do exercise and relax there. Foshan is like a big and warm family with friendly people. It is truly a special city!
standard_answer: Foshan is a city in Guangdong Province. It is a wonderful place to live and visit. Foshan is famous for its long history and rich culture. You can taste delicious morning tea and traditional dishes here. There are many lovely parks in Foshan. People like to do exercise and relax there. Foshan is like a big and warm family with friendly people. It is truly a special city!
